heading: Advance payment of credit for health insurance costs of eligible individuals

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: Not later than the date that is 1 year after the date of the enactment of the Trade Adjustment Assistance Reauthorization Act of 2015, the Secretary shall establish a program for making payments on behalf of certified individuals to providers of qualified health insurance (as defined in section 35(e)) for such individuals.

children.heading: Limitation on advance payments during any taxable year
children.label: b Limitation on advance payments during any taxable year
children.text: The Secretary may make payments under subsection (a) only to the extent that the total amount of such payments made on behalf of any individual during the taxable year does not exceed 72.5 percent of the amount paid by the taxpayer for coverage of the taxpayer and qualifying family members under qualified health insurance for eligible coverage months beginning in the taxable year.

children.heading: Certified individual
children.label: c Certified individual
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “certified individual” means any individual for whom a qualified health insurance costs credit eligibility certificate is in effect.

children.heading: Qualified health insurance costs eligibility certificate
children.label: d Qualified health insurance costs eligibility certificate
A
children.text: in the case of an eligible TAA recipient (as defined in section 35(c)(2)) or an eligible alternative TAA recipient (as defined in section 35(c)(3)), is certified by the Secretary of Labor (or by any other person or entity designated by the Secretary), or

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of an eligible PBGC pension recipient (as defined in section 35(c)(4)), is certified by the Pension Benefit Guaranty Corporation (or by any other person or entity designated by the Secretary).

children.label: A
children.text: the name, address, and telephone number of the State office or offices responsible for providing the individual with assistance with enrollment in qualified health insurance (as defined in section 35(e)),

children.label: B
children.text: a list of the coverage options that are treated as qualified health insurance (as so defined) by the State in which the individual resides, and

children.label: C
children.text: in the case of a TAA-eligible individual (as defined in section 4980B(f)(5)(C)(iv)(II)), a statement informing the individual that the individual has 63 days from the date that is 7 days after the date of the issuance of such certificate to enroll in such insurance without a lapse in creditable coverage (as defined in section 9801(c)).

children.heading: Payment for premiums due prior to commencement of advance payments
children.label: e Payment for premiums due prior to commencement of advance payments
A
children.text: after the date that is 1 year after the date of the enactment of the Trade Adjustment Assistance Reauthorization Act of 2015; and

children.label: B
children.text: prior to the first month for which an advance payment is made on behalf of such individual under subsection (a).

children.heading: Reduction of payment for amounts received under national emergency grants
children.label: 2 Reduction of payment for amounts received under national emergency grants
children.text: The amount of any payment determined under paragraph (1) shall be reduced by the amount of any payment made to the taxpayer for the purchase of qualified health insurance under a national emergency grant pursuant to section 173(f) of the Workforce Investment Act of 1998 (as in effect on the day before the date of enactment of the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act) for a taxable year including the eligible coverage months described in paragraph (1).
